subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! Strive with all thy might to guide humanity and water the garden of the Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده الهی تا توانی در هدایت خلق کوش و سقایت بوستان حق نما ید عنایت در
subcodes.subjects: @unity; oneness of humanity, @spiritual transformation, @Manifestation of God as gardener; cultivator, @love and unity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
